title: helianthemum polygonoides
intro: Helianthemum polygonoides, also known as Sticky Rockrose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Cistaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, attributed to the presence of terpenoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Helianthemum polygonoides are said to include wound healing, antiseptic properties, and the potential to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infused oil, and can be used topically to apply its medicinal properties directly to the skin or wounds.
